$comment: Maps local data paths offloaded to R2. Consumed by paths.ensure_local(). Update when adding or removing cold-stored paths.

data/checkpoints/model_improvement.reason: Legacy A3/S3/S3_pretrain encoders superseded by Aria (archived 2026-04-22)

data/evals/youtube_amt.reason: AMT validation set, rehydrate on demand for harness runs

data/raw/competition.reason: T2 competition origin audio; non-reproducible, remote extraction only

data/raw/asap.reason: Public ASAP dataset; re-fetchable from GitHub

data/embeddings/maestro.regen_command: hf download google/MAESTRO-v3 --repo-type dataset && uv run python scripts/extract_muq_embeddings.py --source maestro
data/embeddings/maestro.reason: MuQ embeddings over MAESTRO; 34GB regenerable on HF Job (~1h L4). Uploading local is 80h at observed 200KiB/s.

data/embeddings/competition.regen_command: rclone copy r2:crescendai-bucket/raw/competition data/raw/competition && uv run python scripts/extract_muq_embeddings.py --source competition
data/embeddings/competition.reason: MuQ embeddings over T2 audio; 23GB regenerable on HF Job after raw/competition is rehydrated.

mirrors.$comment: Durability mirrors — local is primary, R2 is backup. ensure_local() does not rehydrate these.
